name: Margaret Higgins

background.living_situation: Lives alone in her two-story home

personality: Loves a good joke and dry humour
Dislikes being talked at rather than with
Values being treated as an equal, not as an elderly person to be managed
daily_routine: Starts the day with a cup of tea
Feeds her cat Mittens every morning
Spends hours reading or knitting during the day
Watches the news at 6 PM every evening

health.cognitive: Good mental sharpness, no memory issues
health.mobility: Limited mobility in her right knee
health.eating: Forgets to eat when engrossed in a book

interaction_style.tone: Clear, respectful, treat her as an equal
respond_well_to: Asking her opinion rather than giving advice

family.husband: Deceased, married 45 years, she misses him deeply
family.grandchildren: Several grandchildren whose achievements she is proud of
